rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces local ad valorem tax revenue for school districts, a financing source under §48.251(c)(2), requiring increased state funds under §48.251(c)(3) to cover FSP costs.
quote: (2) ad valorem tax revenue generated by local school district effort; and
_note: The proposed change erodes the local revenue component of FSP financing, necessitating consequential adjustments to state funding allocations or related FSP provisions.
